_meta.description: Table narration patterns that keep tabular answers readable by adding a short lead-in and a concise takeaway instead of dropping a table cold.

runtimeUsageNotes.intent: Add the shortest useful framing around a table: what the table shows and what the reader should notice.

en: Here is the cleanest slice of the data.
This table pulls together the relevant fields.
The table below isolates the rows that matter.
pt: Aqui esta o recorte mais limpo dos dados.
Esta tabela junta os campos relevantes.
A tabela abaixo isola as linhas que importam.

en: The most important signal here is {{takeaway}}.
pt: O sinal mais importante aqui e {{takeaway}}.
O que mais se destaca e {{takeaway}}.

rules.check: context.answerMode == 'doc_grounded_table' AND output.hasTable == true AND output.hasLeadIn != true AND output.hasTakeaway != true
